creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
BTW all examples I have seen specify a transport. I suspect this is almost working as designed upstream, with the strange behaviour of invalid packets as an unexpected side effect.

The idea that asterisk should guess the correct protocol by itself is your conclusion, but unless documented somewhere there is no reason to expect this.

I say this because in the end the administrator should know how the PBX is going to connect to each endpoint.

Anyway you should report this upstream in a bug report, so they can have the last word about the expected behaviour.
